nodes.name: Switch - Classify into Segments A / B / C
Google Sheets - Write to Raw Data

subject: ={{ 'Collaboration Opportunity - Indian Wellness Brand x ' + $('Loop - Process One by One').item.json.name }}
parameters.message: ={{ $json.emailPitch || 'Hi, we would love to collaborate with you!' }}

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Mark Email as Sent

parameters.content:
STEP 1 — TRIGGER

Runs automatically every Monday at 9:00 AM via cron schedule. No manual action needed. Initiates the full pipeline.

STEP 2 — DISCOVERY

Apify Instagram Hashtag Scraper is triggered via HTTP POST. Hashtags: #fitnessindia #indianfitness #fitnessmotivation.

A 45-second wait allows the scraper to complete. Results are then fetched via HTTP GET.

Output: Raw profile JSON data.

STEP 3 — FILTERING

Only profiles with 5,000 to 100,000 followers pass through. Profiles outside this range are dropped automatically.

STEP 4 — ENRICHMENT

For each profile:
- Engagement Rate calculated from avg likes and comments
- Email extracted from bio via regex
- City detected from bio text
- Content themes classified from bio keywords

All 13 sheet columns are populated here.

STEP 5 — SEGMENTATION

Segment A — Nano Creators
<=30K followers and >=4% engagement
Collab type: Barter / UGC

Segment B — Mid Tier Micro
30K-100K followers and >=2% engagement
Collab type: Paid Sponsorship / Affiliate

Segment C — High Potential
>=5% engagement regardless of follower count
Collab type: Brand Ambassador

All three are merged and the segment label is stored in the Segment column of the sheet. Use filter view in Google Sheets to view each segment separately.

STEP 6 — AI MESSAGE GENERATION

Each influencer is processed one at a time via a loop.

Gemini 1.5 Flash generates:
1. Email Pitch (60-90 words) — professional, references niche, themes, collaboration type
2. Instagram DM (15-30 words) — casual and direct

A 60-second wait between iterations prevents Gemini API rate limit errors.

Response is parsed from JSON and attached to the record.

STEP 7 — DATA STORAGE

All 13 fields written to the Raw Data tab in Google Sheets.

To view by segment, use the filter view on the Segment column. No separate tabs needed — everything is in one clean sheet.

STEP 8 — OUTREACH

If email found in bio: Gmail node sends outreach automatically. Sheet is updated to Sent.

If no email found: Row is saved in sheet. DM message is ready for manual sending via Instagram or tools like ManyChat.

Note: Meta Graph API requires business approval for automated DM sending.
